sub_pixel_system.notes: Golf game - sub-pixel precision not applicable to ball physics documentation

special_mechanics.name: Ball Physics
special_mechanics.description: Golf ball movement affected by wind conditions and terrain. Ball movements praised for realism in reviews.

special_mechanics.name: Putting Grid
special_mechanics.description: 3D contoured grid visualization on the green to show uneven terrain for putting calculations

tier_notes: T2 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Game is a sports simulation (golf) rather than action platformer. Player movement parameters (walk, run, jump, gravity) are not applicable. Ball physics documented qualitatively as 'realistic' with wind simulation. No technical movement data available in sources.
